opinion.h1: STANDARD OIL COMPANY v. MCLAUGHLIN, 292 U.S. 631 (1934)
opinion.h2: STANDARD OIL COMPANY, petitioner, v. John P. McLAUGHLIN, United States Collector of Internal Revenue, etc.* No. 848.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. F. D. Madison and Alfred Sutro, both of San Francisco, Cal., for petitioner.
The Attorney General, for Collector of Internal Revenue.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 292 U.S. 604, 54 S. Ct. 712, 713, 78 L. Ed. --.[ Standard Oil Company v. McLaughlin 292 U.S. 631 (1934) ]
